message:
feat,test(search): flip default robot-mode to hybrid-preferred + cover semantic flag parsing (bd-3bbv)

Three related test-side additions that land together because they
pin the user-visible wire contract of the search defaults flip and
the new semantic-search flag surface.

tests/fixtures/cli_contract/introspect.json
- Update the --mode help text in the frozen introspect fixture:
    "Search mode: lexical (default), semantic, or hybrid"
  → "Search mode: hybrid-preferred (default), lexical, or semantic"
  Reflects the 20c016e6 change that made hybrid the default but
  still allows fallback to lexical when semantic assets are absent.

tests/cli_robot.rs
- Extend search_robot_meta_includes_fallback_and_cache_stats with
  four new assertions on the robot _meta envelope that now accompanies
  every search response:
    "requested_search_mode" must be "hybrid" when no --mode is passed
      (proves the default flipped).
    "search_mode" must be "lexical" in the fixture (which ships
      without semantic assets) — proves the fallback ladder picks
      the right realized tier.
    "mode_defaulted" must be true (distinguishes user-supplied hybrid
      from auto-defaulted hybrid).
    "fallback_tier" must name the realized tier ("lexical").
    "semantic_refinement" must be false when we landed on lexical.

tests/cli_search_semantic_flags.rs (new file, 57 lines)
- CLI parsing coverage for the five new search flags introduced by
  bd-3bbv: --model, --rerank, --reranker, --daemon, --no-daemon.
- Uses the repo-standard `run_on_large_stack` helper to spawn a 16MB
  stack for clap parsing — clap's Derive-based parser can recurse
  deeply enough on large CLIs to tickle the default stack, a trap
  this file explicitly documents.
- Each test asserts the flag parses to the expected enum variant
  (SearchMode::{Lexical, Semantic, Hybrid}) or bool, and that absent
  flags resolve to None rather than a silent default.

files.patch:
@@ -571,7 +571,7 @@
         },
         {
           "name": "mode",
-          "description": "Search mode: lexical (default), semantic, or hybrid",
+          "description": "Search mode: hybrid-preferred (default), lexical, or semantic",
           "arg_type": "option",
           "value_type": "enum",
           "required": false,
